_comment: WARNING: This egg has been manually designed as a production-grade Kotlin runtime. It supports Kotlin version switching, Java version selection, Gradle/Maven builds, and script execution. Modify only if you understand JVM + Kotlin toolchains, SDKMAN, and build systems.
name: Kotlin Production (Gradle / Maven / Script + Version Control)
author: itzzmateo@devflare.de
description: Production Kotlin runtime with Kotlin + Java version switching, Gradle/Maven support, and script execution mode.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt update
apt install -y git curl jq unzip wget build-essential zip
apt install -y openjdk-21-jdk maven gradle

cd /mnt/server

# Install SDKMAN for Kotlin version management
curl -s https://get.sdkman.io | bash || true
export SDKMAN_DIR="$HOME/.sdkman"
source "$SDKMAN_DIR/bin/sdkman-init.sh" || true

# Install Kotlin (default stable)
sdk install kotlin || true
sdk default kotlin {{KOTLIN_VERSION}} || true

echo "Kotlin production environment ready"

variables.name: Kotlin Version
variables.description: Kotlin version via SDKMAN (e.g. 1.9.24, 2.0.0 if available)

variables.name: Kotlin Script File
variables.description: Kotlin script file used when no build system exists

variables.name: JAR File
variables.description: Fallback jar file if no build system exists

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest git changes on startup
